name: IpGetLastSocketErrorAsString
title: IpGetLastSocketErrorAsString
syntax: long IpGetLastSocketErrorAsString( dword socket, char text[], dword count);
description: The function retrieves the error message of the last operation that failed on the specified socket (see Winsock 2 error code).

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The buffer used to store the error message.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The size of the text buffer.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
